title: Safe Harvest
description: Adds the ability to block the collection of ungrown plants
body:
# 🌾 Safe Harvest - Minecraft Mod 🌾

Are you tired of accidentally breaking crops that aren’t fully grown? 🌱 The Safe Harvest mod is your farming assistant! This simple yet essential mod prevents you from breaking immature crops, saving you time ⏳ and resources 💎 while farming. A perfect addition for those looking for a smoother farming experience in Minecraft! 🌍

## ✨ Key Features
🔒 Safe Harvest Mode: Activate Safe Harvest mode with a hotkey (default: **Shift + H**). When enabled, you’ll only be able to harvest crops when they’re fully grown.
📢 Toggle Alerts: Receive in-game notifications when Safe Harvest mode is enabled or disabled. (with a hotkey: **M**)
🌱 Crop Protection: Never worry about accidentally destroying crops that aren’t ready! The mod cancels the action and lets you know if a crop isn’t ready for harvest.

## 📖 How to Use
Toggle Safe Harvest Mode: Press **Shift + H** to switch the mode on or off. A message in the chat will confirm if Safe Harvest mode is active or disabled.
Protected Harvesting: When Safe Harvest mode is on, any attempt to break immature crops will be blocked, and you’ll see a message saying the crop isn’t ready.

## 🌍 Languages Supported
English
Russian

## ⚙️ Compatibility
Minecraft version: 1.20.1, 1.21.4
Forge support

🤔 Why Safe Harvest?
Safe Harvest is a small but powerful mod that makes Minecraft farming easier and more efficient. 🧑‍🌾 Whether you’re a farming pro or just starting, Safe Harvest helps you avoid costly mistakes, ensuring a better farming experience!

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Install Minecraft Forge.
2. Download the Safe Harvest mod and place it in your mods folder.
3. Launch Minecraft with the Forge profile and enjoy farming with peace of mind! 💪🌾
